description: You are a financial controller at a consumer goods company analyzing product line profitability. Using the data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv (columns: Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Unit_Cost, Unit_Price, Product_Category, Region, Discount), create a profitability analysis report in Power BI Desktop. The report must include two DAX measures named exactly Gross_Profit (total Sales_Amount minus total cost of goods sold) and Profit_Margin_Pct (Gross_Profit divided by total Sales_Amount). Include a Matrix visual with Product_Category as rows, Region as columns, and Gross_Profit as values, and a Card visual displaying the overall Profit_Margin_Pct. Save the report as C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Profitability_Report.pbix and export the Matrix visual's underlying data to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\profit_by_category.csv. Login as user Docker with no password.
